story: Founded in 2019 by two former line cooks, Ember & Ash makes hot sauce in a converted shipping container behind a Portland warehouse. Every batch is hand-bottled and hand-labeled, 40 bottles at a time.

sauces.name: Verde
sauces.notes: Bright and grassy with a quick, clean finish - built for eggs and fish tacos.

sauces.name: Rojo
sauces.base: fresno chile, roasted garlic, smoked paprika
sauces.notes: Slow-building warmth with a smoky sweetness that lingers under the heat.

sauces.name: Negro
sauces.base: ghost pepper, black garlic, charred onion
sauces.notes: A brief sweetness gives way to a wall of heat that doesn't let go.

sales_note: These three are sold individually, year-round, based on how much heat a customer wants for a given dish - not as a boxed set or a tasting flight, and not in any particular order. A customer who likes Rojo has no reason to ever try Negro.
